response_text:
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar
ATTR registration : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusHistory
PK history_id
ATTR history_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_member_id
ATTR crew_member_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK assignment_id
ATTR assignment_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_member_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_id
ATTR belt_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR airport_id : varchar : FK

REL Flight -> Airline : 1..N -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airplane_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL FlightStatusHistory -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatusHistory -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 0..N : FK=status_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_member_id
REL BaggageBelt -> Flight : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL BaggageBelt -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_id
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_id
